meta.purpose: Reusable corpus templates for synthetic tool traces, JSON parsing failures, and debug failure patterns used in evidence-routing evaluation.
meta.caution: These templates simulate failure modes for testing the routing systems ability to detect and handle malformed tool calls, JSON errors, and debug logs.

content_template.recovery_suggestion: Insert comma between key-value pairs.
content_template.test_guidance: Verify the routing layer catches this and does not propagate a traceback to the user.

content_template.error_msg: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 37 (char 36)
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Fix unterminated string or truncation.
content_template.test_guidance: Verify router returns a structured error, not a raw exception dump.

content_template.recovery_suggestion: Strip trailing non-JSON content.
content_template.test_guidance: Router should gracefully handle trailing text without crashing.

content_template.error_msg: Expecting property name enclosed in double quotes: line 1 column 2 (char 1)
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Keys must be double-quoted.
content_template.test_guidance: Unquoted keys should be caught by the JSON parser, not silently fixed.

content_template.error_msg: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 35 (char 34)
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Detect truncation and re-request full tool call token window.
content_template.test_guidance: Truncated tool calls indicate token-limit issues. Router should handle gracefully.

content_template.recovery_suggestion: Retry with timeout=60.0 or split the task into smaller subtasks.
content_template.test_guidance: Router must distinguish timeouts from crashes. Timeout is recoverable; crash is not.

content_template.error_msg: stdout: Killed\nstderr: (process exited with status 137) out of memory
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Reduce memory footprint or request a larger instance. Not recoverable via simple retry.
content_template.test_guidance: OOM is distinct from timeout. Router should flag as resource exhaustion.

content_template.raw_stderr: Traceback (most recent call last):\n  File \"<exec>\", line 1, in <module>\nModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'nonexistent_package'
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Install missing package or use an alternative library.
content_template.test_guidance: Import errors are recoverable by suggesting pip install or alternative approach.

content_template.raw_stderr: Traceback (most recent call last):\n  ...\nTypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for +: 'int' and 'str'
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Cast operands to consistent types before computation.
content_template.test_guidance: Type errors indicate a bug in generated code. Router should route back for code fix.

content_template.error_msg: 429 Too Many Requests. Retry after 60 seconds.
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Backoff and retry with exponential delay (jitter: 1.0s, base: 2.0s, max: 120.0s).
content_template.test_guidance: Rate limits should trigger backoff, not abort the entire pipeline.

content_template.recovery_suggestion: Check API key validity and environment variable configuration.
content_template.test_guidance: Auth errors are non-recoverable without human intervention. Flag for operator attention.

content_template.error_msg: Execution terminated after 30s. No new output in last 25s.
content_template.raw_stderr: Program appears stuck in a loop.
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Add loop bounds, timeout per iteration, or use recursive approach instead.
content_template.test_guidance: Differentiate from normal timeout by output stall pattern. Flag for code review.

content_template.error_msg: maximum recursion depth exceeded in comparison
content_template.raw_stderr: Traceback (most recent call last):\n  ...\nRecursionError: maximum recursion depth exceeded
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Convert recursion to iteration or increase recursion limit with sys.setrecursionlimit().
content_template.test_guidance: Recursion errors are implementation bugs. Route for code fix.

content_template.raw_stderr: Traceback (most recent call last):\n  ...\nFileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Check file path existence before operations. Use os.path.exists() or pathlib.
content_template.test_guidance: File-not-found is common in generated code; router should not treat as critical.

content_template.raw_stderr: Traceback (most recent call last):\n  ...\nPermissionError: [Errno 13] Permission denied
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Verify running user has appropriate permissions. May require elevated privileges.
content_template.test_guidance: Permission errors may indicate sandbox / security issues. Flag for review.

content_template.debug_log: ROUTER: selecting expert for query={query_hash} | cache_hit=False | fallback_reason=expert_overloaded | selected=gpt-3.5-turbo
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Check expert capacity routing logic. Fallback model may degrade quality.
content_template.test_guidance: Model mismatches due to capacity routing should be logged and auditable.

content_template.debug_log: CACHE_HIT: key={cache_key}, age=220d | WARN: age exceeds threshold (180d)
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Invalidate cache entries older than 180d or re-evaluate with current model version.
content_template.test_guidance: Stale cache entries silently return outdated scores. Router must log age warnings.

content_template.debug_log: FALLBACK: attempt=1 expert_busy -> attempt=2 rate_limited -> attempt=3 auth_error -> attempt=4 timeout -> FALLBACK_EXHAUSTED
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Alert operator. Fallback chain exhausted after {n} attempts. Manual intervention required.
content_template.test_guidance: Fallback loops waste budget and time. Router should detect cascading failures early.

content_template.debug_log: ROUTER: append_trace(query_A) -> context window full -> evict_trace(query_B) continued_injection(query_A_trace_into_query_B_context) | RISK: cross-contamination detected
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Flush context between independent queries. Use separate context windows per session.
content_template.test_guidance: Cross-contamination can cause data leakage between user sessions. Must be zero-tolerance.

content_template.authority_note: Current successful workflow. Prefer this over stale list-loop traces.
content_template.anti_pattern: Do not start with repeated fs_list calls when the file path is already known.

content_template.verification: Read back the written result before final response when exact output matters.

content_template.failure: Repeated directory listing consumed budget and delayed validation.

content_template.symptom: Output placed <think> or reasoning prose before a JSON object required by a strict parser.
content_template.validator_error: Expected JSON object at byte 0; found '<'.
content_template.root_cause: Reasoning text leaked into a machine-readable channel.
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Emit only the JSON object for strict-output tasks; put explanations outside the tool payload only when schema permits.

content_template.symptom: Generic memory packet caused the agent to prefer fs_list over the requested fs_read -> json_validate -> fs_write sequence.
content_template.root_cause: Retriever over-weighted a broad 'inspect files first' note despite an exact file path in the query.
content_template.recovery_suggestion: Rank exact workflow traces above broad habits; penalize stale or decoy traces.
